Title: Prohibits persons who were sentenced for a crime involving unlawful sexual conduct or assault from using public transportation
Summary: Prohibits persons who were sentenced for a crime involving unlawful sexual conduct or assault from using public transportation including services in the transportation of passengers, airports, train stations, subway and rail stations, and bus terminals.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the penal law, in relation to prohibiting certain persons who were sentenced of the crime of unlawful sexual conduct or assault committed in or on public transportation from using public transportation
